title: Add a happy-dom + @testing-library/react test infra
body: The repo's vitest config is environment: 'node' and has no DOM testing library. Every React component test is either a source-level structural regex match (kody-chat-composer.spec.ts) or omitted. The MergeButton / PreviewActions integration in this fix is verified by reading the source, not by mounting the component. Adding happy-dom + @testing-library/react (and a small wrapper per component) would let a follow-up replace the structural regex with a real render and assert on the disabled state under various CI conditions.
rationale: The pattern works for layout and import-wiring assertions, but cannot verify that MergeButton's disabled state actually gates the click handler in PreviewActions. A real render would catch behavioral regressions the structural test can't.
